title: Auto-distill fallback and kage resume continuity (v2.2.0 behavior)
summary: Stop hook runs kage distill project session auto: drafts go to the pending inbox tagged auto distill, excluded from recall until kage review approval. Since v2.2.0 auto distill is signal gated: observationSignalScore ker
body: Stop hook runs kage distill --project --session --auto: drafts go to the pending inbox tagged auto-distill, excluded from recall until kage review approval. Since v2.2.0 auto-distill is signal-gated: observationSignalScore (kernel.ts) must be >= AUTO_DISTILL_SIGNAL_THRESHOLD (0.4); raw JSON payloads, hook notifications, sub-50-char fragments, flag dumps, and kage self-echoes score 0 and are counted in skipped_low_signal. observe() tags low_signal at ingestion. kage resume prints the previously digest (last session, drafts count, reconciliation items) AND a Recent memory timeline: newest 15 packets one-line each, summaries for newest 3, capped ~800 tokens. SessionStart hook appends resume output to the injected policy; manual learn/capture/distill remain ungated.
